subject: Subtomogram reconstruction in Warp not working
body:
Hi all, 

I'm working on learning the warp, m, relion pipeline and I've been 
following the TeamTomo walkthrough 
(https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/relion.html). 

I just recreated my star file for the first 5A reconstruction in Warp, but 
when I go to select "reconstruct sub-tomograms", it will not let me select 
"volumes" on the export subtomograms list. Does anyone know what the 
problem might be? Is it a naming convention problem, a data location 
problem, or a star file problem? Thank you! 

Cheers, 
Rose
